# WindowCategory enumeration

Logical category for a plugin window, used to group windows in the Settings layout editor.

```csharp
public enum WindowCategory
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| HUD | `0` | Gameplay heads-up displays (meters, cooldowns, party frames). |
| Tools | `1` | Interactive tool panels (module optimizer, data inspector, settings). |
| Debug | `2` | Developer / diagnostic windows (debug info, perf overlay). |
